summary: The diff implements the vast majority of REQ-10 and REQ-11 requirements. Backend gains a 'rent' ListingStatus, frontend adds listing type filters, badges, search bar navigation, post-property form field, footer contact details, agent card fallbacks, and WhatsApp links. One minor gap exists: the backend uses a 'rent' status on the existing ListingStatus enum rather than a separate 'listingType' field with 'sale'|'rent' values as specified in the AC. All REQ-11 contact details are correctly implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend Property type includes a listingType field with values: 'sale' | 'rent'
missing_requirements.reason: The backend adds '#rent' as a new variant to the existing ListingStatus enum (alongside #active, #pending, #sold) rather than introducing a dedicated separate 'listingType' field with values 'sale' | 'rent' as specified in the acceptance criteria. The Property type in main.mo does not have a standalone listingType field.
